name: document-hook-glibc-incompatibility
description: Document pre-commit hook OS/runtime incompatibilities in CONTRIBUTING.md. Use when: (1) a pre-commit hook fails due to host OS constraints rather than code errors, (2) a wrapper script already handles the incompatibility but CONTRIBUTING.md lacks a discoverable explanation, (3) contributors report confusing hook failures tied to glibc, musl, or other system library versions.
